hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command // "") | test("\\bgit\\s+push\\b") then "<system-reminder>CE Rule 10 — post-push checkpoint: call end_session (MCP tool) before ending your turn. If MCP is not connected, run `npx @compr/contextengine-mcp end-session` in terminal instead. Resolve any FAIL items it reports before finishing.</system-reminder>" else empty end'

jq -r 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("ContextEngine/package\\.json$") then "<system-reminder>CE Rule 3 — IP PROTECTION: You just edited package.json. Verify the files array does NOT include server/, server/**, or any glob that would sweep in server/. server/ contains delta modules (agents.ts, collectors.ts, search.ts, activation server) and MUST NEVER ship to npm. If you added server/ intentionally, STOP and confirm with the user before commit.</system-reminder>" else empty end'
